blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Needs real authenticated browser session to verify /login redirect behavior for signed-in user; no valid session bootstrap available.
Callback validation path is gated by missing platform OAuth API credentials in environment, preventing deterministic state-mismatch validation.
Requires authenticated dashboard session; login flow unavailable in validation env due missing usable InsForge runtime credentials/session.
Requires authenticated /video-studio UI access; auth/login path unavailable in current validation context.
Datetime-local PostEditorDrawer scheduling UI is part of the later scheduled-publishing milestone, not available in backend-fixes validation scope.
variant_group_id behavioral flow depends on optimize/variant features scheduled for later milestone; only schema column existence is currently verifiable.
source_platform behavioral assertions depend on optimize feature and variant creation flow from later milestone.
Rate-limit 429 path requires authenticated dispatch-token; unauthenticated calls only reach 401 guard.
Contract includes byok/optimize routes that are not implemented until byok-optimize milestone, so full route-set validation is deferred.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for api-curl and agent-browser isolation boundaries.
Added troubleshooting note for transient .next module error (`Cannot find module './9276.js'`) and documented auth prerequisite for /api/generate rate-limit validation.

orchestratorOverride.reason: 9 blocked assertions moved to polish milestone (cross-area-flow-fixes) because they require InsForge/OAuth credentials that user has not yet provided. 13/22 assertions passed. Blocked assertions will be validated when credentials are available in later milestones.
